overview.description: The iShares Aaa-A Rated Corporate Bond ETF (QLTA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of dollar-denominated fixed-rate corporate bonds rated AAA-A issued by US and non-US corporations with maturities of at least one year. QLTA was launched on Feb 14, 2012 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg US Corporate Capped Index (Aaa - A)

data.title: Bond market dislocations continue. What market analysts are watching now
data.text: Ed Rosenberg, senior vice president and head of ETFs at American Century, and John Davi, founder and chief investment officer of Astoria Portfolio Advisors, talk the bond ETF market's recent discrepan...
